questions: Canva free te ki ki kora jay
Canva diye ki professional design hoy
answers: Canva is a user-friendly online design tool with thousands of templates for social media posts, presentations, posters, resumes, and more. It's perfect for non-designers who need quick, professional-looking graphics.
Canva holo ekta easy online design tool — template choose koro, edit koro, download koro. Social media post, poster, presentation shob quick e banano jay.

Canva's free tier includes thousands of templates, basic elements, and 5GB storage. Canva Pro adds premium templates, Brand Kit, background remover, and more. It's great for quick designs but not a Photoshop replacement.

Canva is excellent for social media graphics, simple presentations, and marketing materials. While it won't replace professional tools for complex work, it's the fastest way to create decent-looking designs.
